title: UCP (Universal Clientside Pack)
description: Modpack only with client side mods. A lot of useful features, all in one.
body:
## UCP (Universal Clientside Pack)

**Tired of cluttering your game with countless client-side mods?** UCP streamlines your Minecraft experience with a curated selection of enhancements that won't touch the core gameplay or require any server-side installations. 

**Here’s a glimpse of what UCP offers:**

* **Enhanced Visuals:** Immerse yourself in a more beautiful and immersive world with mods like Sodium, Iris Shaders, Continuity, and Ambient Environment, bringing smoother performance, realistic lighting, and stunning atmospheric effects. 
* **Quality of Life Improvements:**  From convenient inventory management with Inventory Profiles Next to helpful HUD additions with BetterF3 and AppleSkin, UCP optimizes your gameplay for a smoother, more enjoyable experience. Navigate with ease using VoxelMap and never miss a beat with music notifications.
* **Performance Boost:** Enjoy a buttery-smooth experience even on modest hardware, thanks to performance-enhancing mods such as Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore. These mods optimize your game for maximum FPS without sacrificing visual fidelity.
* **Customization Galore:**  UCP empowers you to tailor your Minecraft experience to your liking. Fine-tune your FOV, view bobbing, crosshair style, and more with mods like Dynamic FPS, Dynamic Crosshair, and First-Person Model.
* **And much more!** This pack includes a plethora of other subtle yet impactful enhancements, including chat improvements, convenient keybinds, and visual tweaks, all working together to elevate your Minecraft experience.

**UCP is perfect for players who crave:**

* A client-side only modpack that is compatible with vanilla servers.
* A lightweight and performance-friendly pack.
* A visually stunning and immersive experience.
* A high degree of customization and control over their game. 

**Start enjoying a smoother, richer Minecraft experience today!**

I recommend downloading my [NMI - server side mods only](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nmi) mod pack with only server side mods.
